# Gemini / Google AI China Guide by ChongGrok

> Independent membership subscription and troubleshooting knowledge base for users of their own Google accounts. ChongGrok is not affiliated with Google.

## Main pages

- Main guide: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/gemini-google-ai-pro-china-guide/
- Topic index: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/gemini-google-ai-pro-china-guide/guides/
- English summary: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/gemini-google-ai-pro-china-guide/en/
- Cross-product safety checklist: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/resources/ai-membership-safety-checklist/

## Core guides

- Own-account upgrade and verification: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/gemini-google-ai-pro-china-guide/guides/gemini-own-account-upgrade/
- Google AI plan selection: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/gemini-google-ai-pro-china-guide/guides/google-ai-plans/
- Payment errors: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/gemini-google-ai-pro-china-guide/guides/gemini-payment-errors/
- Paid but entitlement not active: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/gemini-google-ai-pro-china-guide/guides/gemini-paid-but-not-active/
- Renewal failed or downgraded: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/gemini-google-ai-pro-china-guide/guides/gemini-renewal-failed/
- Google One, web and Google Play billing: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/gemini-google-ai-pro-china-guide/guides/gemini-billing-channel/
- Account safety and evidence checklist: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/gemini-google-ai-pro-china-guide/guides/gemini-account-safety/

## Scope

- Membership subscription assistance for users' own accounts only.
- No fixed credential is claimed; required information is confirmed case by case.
- Passwords, two-factor codes and recovery codes are not requested.
- No API credits, ready-made accounts, SMS verification or bulk registration.
- Plans, prices, features and availability follow Google's live official pages.
